name: REVOLUTION MEDICINES INC
summary: REVOLUTION MEDICINES INC is a clinical-stage precision oncology company focused on developing novel therapies for RAS-addicted cancers. Headquartered in Redwood City, California, the company is developing a pipeline of small molecule inhibitors that target the RAS signaling pathway, which is frequently mutated in cancer. Revolution Medicines aims to address unmet medical needs in RAS-driven cancers by developing more effective and targeted therapies.
